description: Each line segment and data point is colored with a different bright, unrelated categorical color (red, blue, green, orange, etc.), which destroys the visual continuity of what should be smooth, sequential trend lines. A reader would struggle to follow either the Male or Female trend across age groups, as the constantly shifting colors suggest unrelated discrete categories rather than a continuous progression. The chart becomes visually chaotic, making it impossible to track each series as a coherent whole.
